content.hook: The 80/20 rule applies to automation too.
content.body:
After implementing AI solutions for 50+ businesses, I've noticed a pattern:

20% of automation efforts yield 80% of the results.

The key is identifying the right processes to automate:
1. Repetitive tasks (data entry, scheduling)
2. Rule-based decisions (invoice approvals, email sorting)
3. High-volume, low-complexity work (report generation)

Start with these, and you'll see immediate impact.

What's your 20%?
